docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REQUEST FOR SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER. FILED BY PLAINTIFF VILLARREAL, MARIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-03-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-03-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---AVELINA PRITCHARD. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER--- EDUARDO ALVARDO. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS -CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO MARIA VILLAREAL ON SEPTEMBER 29, 2014. ENVELOPE STAMPED, "RETURN TO SENDER-NO SUCH NUMBER-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,400.00 FILED BY VILLARREAL, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT ESTRELLA, PAULINO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-2014 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: PLAINTIFF - MARIA VILLARREAL; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
